All endpoints working perfectly. Here's a summary of what was built:

### Files Created

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `Models/TicketData.cs` | ML.NET input/output data classes with column mappings |
| `Models/TicketRequest.cs` | API request/response DTOs |
| `Models/EvaluationMetrics.cs` | Metrics response model with per-category breakdown |
| `Services/TicketClassifierService.cs` | ML pipeline: text featurization → feature concatenation → SDCA Maximum Entropy trainer |
| `Controllers/TicketClassifierController.cs` | REST endpoints with input validation |
| `Program.cs` | Updated to register the classifier as a singleton |

### Endpoints

- **`POST /api/ticketclassifier/predict`** — classifies a ticket, returns predicted category + confidence scores
- **`GET /api/ticketclassifier/metrics`** — returns evaluation metrics (macro/micro accuracy, log-loss, per-category precision/recall)

### Test Results

| Input | Predicted | Confidence |
|---|---|---|
| "App crashing" / priority 1 | General | ~37% (small dataset, weak signal) |
| "Overcharged" / "charged $50 on invoice" | **Billing** | **93.8%** ✅ |
| "Question about features" / "integrate tools" | **General** | **93.4%** ✅ |
| Empty subject (validation) | **400 Bad Request** ✅ | |

Training metrics show 100% accuracy on the training set (expected with only 6 samples). With more data in `tickets.csv`, the model will generalize better to unseen inputs.
